sourceMovie.title: Edge of Tomorrow
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Edge of Tomorrow (2014) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Edge of Tomorrow clicked for you, Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Edge of Tomorrow?
faq.answer: Try Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones, Oblivion, Aliens—each shares DNA with Edge of Tomorrow while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Edge of Tomorrow?
faq.answer: Edge of Tomorrow (2014) is best described as Action, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Edge of Tomorrow worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
